---
listing:
  contents: 
    - "posts/*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date asc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: false
  image-align: left
  image-height: "8em"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---


<div style="text-align: center; margin: 2rem 0;">
  <img src="image3.png" alt="Teaching Finance with AI" style="max-width: 400px; width: 100%; height: auto;">
</div>

<div style="position: absolute; top: 1rem; left: 1rem; font-size: 1.5rem;">
  <a href="https://finance-and-ai.kerryback.com" title="Home" style="text-decoration: none; color: #333;">
    <i class="bi bi-house"></i>
  </a>
</div>
